page_metadata.biotools__summary: Statistical haplotype reconstruction algorithm targeted for large-scale disease association studies. It is especially suitable for data sets with a large number of subjects and a large number of possibly sparsely located markers.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Statistical haplotype reconstruction algorithm targeted for large-scale disease association studies. It is especially suitable for data sets with a large number of subjects and a large number of possibly sparsely located markers.
